description: Guzzlord, Shadow Feraligatr, and Aegislash team played in the Experimental Cup to hit Legend. Shadow Feraligatr is preferred over non-shadow to twoshot Lickilicky with Hydro Cannon and hit harder into Togekiss.
performanceNotes: Shadow Feraligatr twoshots Lickilicky with Hydro Cannon
Aegislash wins charge attack priority into almost everything due to high attack in blade form

sources.author: CalebPeng
sources.videoTitle: Hitting LEGEND with the HIGHEST SKILLED Pokémon
